image_prompt: Does this image contain an elephant?
audio_prompt: Does this audio contain an elephant sound?

positive: a wildlife camera trap image showing an elephant
an elephant captured in the photo
negative: a photograph that does not contain an elephant
a wildlife camera trap image of a non-elephant animal
an animal photo without any elephant

positive: a sound recording of an elephant
audio of an elephant trumpeting or vocalizing
negative: a sound recording of an animal that is not an elephant
audio of a non-elephant animal vocalization
animal sound clip without any elephant

cascade_form: Option E + dual-modality (image+audio uncertain) + client-side union of cities

baseline.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT city FROM (
      SELECT City AS city FROM animals_dataset.image_data_mm
      WHERE AI.IF(('Does this image contain an elephant? ', image), connection_id => 'us.connection', endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash')
      UNION ALL
      SELECT City AS city FROM animals_dataset.audio_data_mm
      WHERE AI.IF(('Does this audio contain an elephant sound? ', audio), connection_id => 'us.connection', endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash')
    )

cascade.method: Option E dual-modality + client-side city union
stage1_sqls:
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE animals_dataset.q5_image_uncertain_mm AS
    SELECT m.Species, m.City, m.StationID, ot.ref AS image
    FROM animals_dataset.image_data_images m
    JOIN animals_dataset.image_data_external ot ON ot.uri = m.ImagePath
    WHERE m.ImagePath IN UNNEST(@uris)

    CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE animals_dataset.q5_audio_uncertain_mm AS
    SELECT m.Animal, m.City, m.StationID, ot.ref AS audio
    FROM animals_dataset.audio_data_files m
    JOIN animals_dataset.audio_data_external ot ON ot.uri = m.AudioPath
    WHERE m.AudioPath IN UNNEST(@uris)
cascade.stage2_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT city FROM (
      SELECT City AS city FROM animals_dataset.q5_image_uncertain_mm
      WHERE AI.IF(('Does this image contain an elephant? ', image), connection_id => 'us.connection', endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash')
      UNION ALL
      SELECT City AS city FROM animals_dataset.q5_audio_uncertain_mm
      WHERE AI.IF(('Does this audio contain an elephant sound? ', audio), connection_id => 'us.connection', endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash')
    )
